project.name: PROPHIT
project.description: PROPHIT is a prediction market token formed through HACD Stack. Holders use PRT to stake on market predictions, earn from accuracy, and build on-chain reputation backed by real PoW formation cost.

asset.utility_summary: Each PRT unit is used to enter prediction markets, stake on outcomes, and earn rewards from correct predictions. Top predictors gain verifiable on-chain reputation. PRT also serves as the ecosystem's base participation unit.

copy.headline: Predict. Stake. Prove it. Formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: PROPHIT issues PRT — a prediction market Stack Asset where every token carries real PoW formation cost. Put your alpha where your HACD is.
copy.short_description: PRT is formed across 200 HACD lots at 30 HAC each. Total supply is 1,000,000 PRT. No inflation. No hidden allocation. Formed on-chain. Use PRT to stake predictions, earn from accuracy, and build verifiable on-chain reputation.
copy.risk_disclosure: PRT is a utility Stack Asset for prediction market participation, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. Prediction market features depend on platform development. Formation cost is non-refundable. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review.

notes: Project generated by HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill for HACD Labs Incubator Season 2.
All parameters marked as draft. Issuer confirmation required before Launchpad publication.
Prediction market utility (oracle, resolution, leaderboard) is planned — must not be promised as guaranteed.
Maximum 5 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
Target launch date is tentative and subject to HACD Labs review timeline.
